title: Faculty of Science — undergraduate entry (physical science stream)
subject: Science
description: State university degree pathway after A/L; competitive UGC intake. Science streams lead to BSc programmes.
freeNote: No tuition at state universities; registration and exam fees may apply.

title: Faculty of Engineering — undergraduate programmes
subject: Engineering
description: BSc Engineering degrees via UGC admission; specialisations in civil, electrical, mechanical, and more.

title: Bachelor of Arts (General / Special) — distance & open learning
subject: Humanities
description: Flexible BA pathways with OUSL course modules; suitable for working adults and repeat candidates.
freeNote: Programme fees per credit/course; see OUSL fee schedule.

title: Diploma in Information Technology
subject: Computer Science
description: Practical IT diploma covering programming, databases, and systems; multiple intakes per year.

title: Foundation programme — pathway to IT / Business degrees
subject: Foundation
description: Foundation after O/L leading to SLIIT undergraduate degrees in computing and business.

title: MSc in Computer Science (by research / coursework)
subject: Computer Science
description: Postgraduate computer science at a state university; check faculty for current intakes and tracks.
freeNote: State university PG; limited fee components.

title: PhD by research — Faculty of Science
subject: Science
description: Doctoral research in science departments; requires supervisor alignment and faculty approval.
freeNote: Research degrees at state universities; registration costs only.

title: Certificate in Nursing / healthcare assistant (example intake)
subject: Health Sciences
description: Short certificate-style healthcare training; verify current accreditation and registration with relevant councils.
freeNote: Always confirm programme recognition on the UGC / professional body websites.

title: NVQ-aligned technical & vocational programmes
subject: Technical & Vocational
description: Skills-based training after O/L; many programmes are low-cost or subsidised through public TVET routes.
freeNote: Many public courses are free or minimal fee; check district schedules.

title: MBA / Masters in Business Administration
subject: Business
description: Postgraduate business programmes; some streams may be fee-paying even within state universities.
freeNote: Confirm current fee structure with the faculty; executive MBAs are typically paid.

title: Bachelor of Architecture
subject: Architecture
description: Professional architecture degree; UGC admission from A/L streams with high merit.
freeNote: State university; studio and material costs may apply.

title: Certificate in English / communication skills
subject: Languages
description: Short certificate modules for workplace English and academic skills.

title: Professional certifications — ICT / security (member programmes)
subject: Computer Science
description: Industry-oriented short programmes and certifications; membership-based learning events.
freeNote: Typically paid workshops and exam fees.

title: BSc in Agriculture
subject: Agriculture
description: Undergraduate agriculture degree via UGC intake; field work and research components.

title: IELTS / English proficiency preparation (private centres)
subject: Languages
description: Exam preparation courses; compare centres and verify reviews before enrolling.
freeNote: Paid tuition; British Council also lists official test info.

title: PI-SAT scholarship foundation — A/L support & university prep
subject: Foundation
description: Non-profit foundation offering free classes and scholarships for disadvantaged students; eligibility-based.
freeNote: Free for selected students; donations support operations.
